name: E-commerce: Login with Invalid Credentials
description: This test verifies that an error message is displayed for various incorrect login combinations.
descriptionHtml: This test verifies that an error message is displayed for various incorrect login combinations.

testStage.description: This test verifies that an error message is displayed for various incorrect login combinations.

steps.name: Verify that the error message is displayed

labels.name: story
labels.value: As a user, I see an error when I use invalid credentials
